scenario: The FIELD-OMISSION redaction surface for each dotenv file: env renders KEY NAMES ONLY (no values/comments/content); secret renders NAME/PATH/ACTION ONLY (no content, no keys). This is the §C.2 redaction pin. Mirrors renderer/all-types.json's env/secret byRelPath entries. SPECIFICATION golden.
adapterStatus: The dotenv ADAPTER is not built, but the env-file/secret-file RENDERERS are coded (src/output/renderers.ts) — the redaction below is code-grounded and is ported as adapter-keyed presentation (behavior-preserving, spec §2/plan §7.3).
specSource: docs/design/akm-0.9.0-bundle-adapter-spec.md §2 (renderer implementations 'env-keys-only', 'secret-name-only'; redaction keyed on the ADAPTER, never the type), §6 (env 'key NAMES only, values never indexed'; secret 'filename only'), §7 (dotenv 'metadata-only'); normative akm-format-neutral-bundle-workspace-spec.md §21.2 'Sensitivity exception' (dotenv/secret components MUST present only key names / file name and MUST NOT read or print the body). [Task ref: '§C.2/redaction'.]
realWorldSource: akm env-file / secret-file renderers (src/output/renderers.ts) — the exact action strings + field sets reproduced here; matches the frozen renderer/all-types.json env + secret entries
notes: SPECIFICATION golden and THE PRIMARY REDACTION ORACLE. presentationFor('env') → renderer 'env-file'; presentationFor('secret') → renderer 'secret-file'. The redaction is keyed on the ADAPTER/type-family, NEVER on the open `type` value — a frontmatter `type:` cannot opt out (normative §21.2).

env-file: rendered fields = {type, name, path, action, keys}. `keys` is the KEY-NAME array; VALUES, COMMENTS, and raw CONTENT are OMITTED. There is deliberately no `content`/`template`/`prompt` field.

secret-file: rendered fields = {type, name, path, action}. NO `content`, NO `keys`, NO values — the entire file is the secret and nothing is emitted. Even secrets/ci.env (a .env with KEY=VALUE lines) renders name-only, because type=secret (dir gate) selects the secret-file renderer — a STRONGER redaction than an env/ file.

The `action` strings are the exact static templates the env-file/secret-file renderers emit (literal `<ref>`/`<command>`/`<VAR>` placeholders, matching the frozen all-types golden). The shorter src/core/type-presentation.ts action variants are noted per entry but the redaction-bearing renderer action is the load-bearing one here.

env/app.env.label: Env
env/app.env.action: Environment — key names only. Use `akm env run <ref> -- <command>` to run with the whole .env injected; prefer `--clean` to minimize inherited parent env. AKM itself does not print values, but child stdout/stderr is not redacted. `akm env export <ref> --out <file>` writes a sourceable script to a file. Never `source` the raw file. Values stay on disk and are never written to akm's stdout.

env/dangerous.env.label: Env
env/dangerous.env.action: Environment — key names only. Use `akm env run <ref> -- <command>` to run with the whole .env injected; prefer `--clean` to minimize inherited parent env. AKM itself does not print values, but child stdout/stderr is not redacted. `akm env export <ref> --out <file>` writes a sourceable script to a file. Never `source` the raw file. Values stay on disk and are never written to akm's stdout.

redaction.note: even the dangerous keys are surfaced by NAME only; their VALUES are never emitted.

secrets/deploy-key.label: Secret
secrets/deploy-key.action: Secret — name only; the file contents are the value and are never written to akm's stdout. Use `akm secret path <ref>` for the file path, or `akm secret run <ref> <VAR> -- <command>` to run with the value injected into $VAR.

secrets/ci.env.label: Secret
secrets/ci.env.action: Secret — name only; the file contents are the value and are never written to akm's stdout. Use `akm secret path <ref>` for the file path, or `akm secret run <ref> <VAR> -- <command>` to run with the value injected into $VAR.

redaction.note: STRONGER than env: this is a .env file with KEY=VALUE lines, but type=secret (secrets/ dir gate) selects secret-file, so NOT EVEN the key names are emitted.
